sourceSummary.oneLine: Customer requirements for a hand-held rechargeable X-ray product covering design, components, performance, detector, and environmental conditions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design input/customer requirements evidence for DHF traceability.
keyPoints: Product is required to be hand-held with a handle and weight under 4 kg.
Battery pack requirement includes 29.6V/1,470mAh Li-Polymer cells, 2 hour charging time, and 720W max output power.
Image acquisition identifies H&abyz A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW declared in K223930 or alternatives that are U.S. 510(k) cleared.
Operational environment is 10℃ to 35℃, 30% to 75%RH, and 700 to 1060hPa.

concepts.evidence: Hand-held형태로, 손잡이 부분이 필요하며 제품의 무게는 4kg under.

evidence.claim: The product must be hand-held, include a handle, and weigh under 4 kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Hand-held형태로, 손잡이 부분이 필요하며 제품의 무게는 4kg under.

evidence.claim: The product requires a rechargeable built-in battery and a hand switch.
The adapter input is 100-240VAC at 50/60Hz and output is 20VDC/3.25A/65W for USB C-type PD.
evidence.evidenceText:
Input Voltage

100-240VAC, 50/60Hz

Output Voltage

20VDC/ 3.25A/65W ---- USB C-type PD 용

evidence.claim: The battery pack uses 29.6V/1,470mAh(8S1P) Li-Polymer cells, has BMS control circuit, 2 hour charging time, and 720W max output power.
evidence.evidenceText:
Cell

29.6V/1,470mAh(8S1P), Li-Polymer

Control Circuit

BMS

Charging Time

2hr

Output Power

720Wmax

evidence.claim: The kV range is 50kV to 90kV with 10mA from 50kV to 70kV and 8mA from 71kV to 90kV.
Exposure time range is 0.040 to 2.000 seconds.

evidence.evidenceText:
Inherent Filtration of Beam liming Device: 0.5 mm Al,

Inherent Filtration of High Voltage tank: 0.5 mm Al

Added filter 2.0mm Al

Total Filtration : 3.0mm Al

evidence.claim: Special features include DR Interface, Calibration, APR, and Remote Function.
evidence.evidenceText:
Special Features

DR Interface, Calibration, APR, Remote Function

evidence.claim: The X-ray tube is OX/90 with 0.5 mm x 0.5 mm focal spot, 19 degree target angle, and 10kJ anode heat storage.
evidence.evidenceText:
X-Ray TUBE

OX/90

Focal Spot

0.5 mm x 0.5 mm

Target Angle

19 degree

Anode Heat Storage

10kJ

evidence.claim: The collimator is manual, double slit with minimum X-ray field ≤ 5×5cm at 100cm SID and maximum X-ray field ≤ 47×47cm at 100cm SID.
evidence.evidenceText:
Collimator

Type

Manual, Double Slit

Min. X-ray Field

≤ 5×5cm @ 100cm SID

Max. X-ray Field

≤ 47×47cm @ 100cm SID

evidence.claim: Image acquisition includes H&abyz A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW declared in K223930 or U.S. 510(k) cleared alternatives.
evidence.evidenceText:
H&abyz A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW : declared in K223930

or alternatives U.S. 510(k) cleared

evidence.claim: Flat panel detector specifications list F1417MCW, A1417MCW, and A1717MCW pixel size, resolution, and a-Si technology.
evidence.evidenceText:
F1417MCW : 140 μm, 2,560 x 3,072 pixels, a-Si

A1417MCW : 140 μm, 2,560 x 3,072 pixels, a-Si

A1717MCW : 140 μm, 3,072 x 3,072 pixels, a-Si

evidence.claim: Product dimensions are 293.6(L) x 256.5(W) x 151.9(H) mm and weight is under 3.5kg.
evidence.evidenceText:
Dimension

293.6(L) x 256.5(W) x 151.9(H) mm

Weight

Under 3.5kg

evidence.claim: Operational environment is 10℃ to 35℃, 30% to 75%RH, and 700 to 1060hPa.
evidence.evidenceText:
Operational Environment

Temperature Range

10℃ ~ 35℃ (50℉~95℉)

Humidity Range

30% ~75%RH

Atmosphere Range

700 ~ 1060hPa

evidence.claim: Storage and transportation environment is -10℃ to 50℃, 10% to 80%RH, and 500 to 1060hPa.
evidence.evidenceText:
Storage and Transportation

Temperature Range

-10℃ ~ 50℃ (-14℉~122℉)

Humidity Range

10% ~80%RH

Atmosphere Range

500 ~ 1060hPa

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present in the source text or metadata.
Revision or version is not present in the source text or metadata.
